narrative: PRL bounced overnight: volume-weighted price climbed to $0.8548 (+8.41% 24h) on $213.1k of cross-venue volume — a third more turnover than yesterday and the first green session since the rally peak. The bridge kept absorbing flows hand-over-fist: custody +5.2% to 473,997 PRL and minted WPRL +5.2% to 472,456, with surplus widening to 0.62% as new deposits ran ahead of mint settlement. Network hashrate stepped back up to 24.36 EH/s (+5.6% in 24h) on roughly the same MinePRL footprint (35 GPUs, down from 45 but offset by per-rig hashpower), and block cadence stayed near 126s. Code velocity held: public-frontend 90 commits/7d through RC5.35, pearl-research-labs/pearl core nudged up to 159 stars with 26 open PRs in flight.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: PRL price +8.41% in 24h ($0.7909 → $0.8548) on $213k volume across 7 Ethereum pairs — first green 24h since the post-rally drawdown began.
Bridge custody +5.2% to 473,997 PRL and minted WPRL +5.2% to 472,456 — net inbound +23.4k PRL in 24h, the largest single-day deposit cycle of the month.
Network hashrate +5.6% to 24.36 EH/s recovers most of yesterday's dip; MinePRL GPU count 45 → 35 but reported pool hashrate held, suggesting larger rigs replacing smaller ones.

/api/supply (472,455.86 PRL) leads /api/custody totalSupplyGrains (471,069.86 PRL) by ~1,386 PRL — likely an in-flight mint not yet reflected in custody snapshot; verified persistent across 3 reads, not a transient race.

social.summary: Conversation around @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz remained low-volume overnight; no incident chatter, no coordinated complaints, no fresh narrative push. Price recovery hasn't yet translated to noticeable social pickup.

github.last_commit_msg: RC5.35: Rabby first; drop named MetaMask entry to kill blank-screen bug
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
